steps_generated.action: Press TAB, type Movie File In, and drop the Movie File In TOP in the network.
steps_generated.expect: You should see the Movie File In TOP appear in the network.

steps_generated.action: Press TAB, type Switch, and drop the Switch TOP in the network.
steps_generated.expect: You should see the Switch TOP appear in the network.

steps_generated.action: Drag the output of the first Movie File In TOP into the first input of the Switch TOP.
steps_generated.expect: You should see a wire connecting those nodes.
